data_description.name_suffix: Appended to all entity names of this device (e.g. "Veranda" gives "Popup Veranda") so multiple TVs stay distinguishable in pickers.

user.title: Add PiPup device
user.description: Connect to a TV running the PiPup fork (see the integration documentation).

data_description.name_suffix: Appended to all entity names of this device (e.g. "Veranda" gives "Popup Veranda") so multiple TVs stay distinguishable in pickers.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to PiPup on this host/port
error.unsupported_version: This device runs the original PiPup without /state support; install the fork APK first

abort.already_configured: This PiPup device is already configured

data.default_title_color: Default title color (#RRGGBB, empty = app default)
data.default_message_color: Default message color (#RRGGBB, empty = app default)
data.default_background_color: Default background color (#AARRGGBB, empty = app default)

data_description.name_suffix: Appended to all entity names of this device (e.g. "Veranda" gives "Popup Veranda") so multiple TVs stay distinguishable in pickers.

options.stream: Live stream (HLS — can freeze live TV)

show.name: Show popup
show.description: Shows a popup on the targeted PiPup device(s). Duration 0 keeps it visible until dismissed.

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: Seconds to show the popup; 0 = until dismissed or replaced. When omitted, the device default (integration settings) is used.

popup_id.name: Popup ID
popup_id.description: Identifier: re-sending the same ID and content only extends the timer (no flicker); dismiss can target this ID.

position.name: Position
position.description: Corner or center of the screen. When omitted, the device's configured default position (select entity) is used.

camera_entity.name: Camera
camera_entity.description: Camera entity to show; overrides the media URLs.

camera_mode.name: Camera mode
camera_mode.description: How the camera is shown. MJPEG (default) is software-decoded and audio-free — safe while the TV plays video. HLS uses a hardware decoder and can freeze concurrent playback on some TVs.

video_url.name: Video URL
video_url.description: Video to play (HLS/MP4/RTSP support depends on the TV).

web_url.name: Web URL
web_url.description: Web page to render (JavaScript and autoplay enabled).

muted.name: Mute audio
muted.description: Mutes audio in video/web streams. When omitted, the device default applies (integration settings; audio can freeze video on some TVs).

tts.name: Speak text
tts.description: Text spoken aloud on the TV when the popup appears (app 0.2.5 or newer).

tts_language.name: Speech language
tts_language.description: BCP-47 language tag for the spoken text (e.g. nl-NL); device default when omitted.

dismiss.name: Dismiss popup
dismiss.description: Removes the visible popup on the targeted PiPup device(s).

popup_id.name: Popup ID
popup_id.description: Only dismiss when the visible popup has this ID.
